title: So guys is this spam
wikitext:
[]: So guys is this spam? Post by Smugleaf » Sat Jul 24, 2010 2:29 pm Does anybody of you know the name of the fonts used in the EoE titles?, i mean "one more final etc..." because i like those =(, please EGF help your lovely smugleaf to get those

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jul 24, 2010 2:45 pm I think it's MS Mincho or a font similar to it.

[]: Post by NemZ » Sat Jul 24, 2010 3:23 pm Possibly a condensed Bodonni or Century? Hmm.

[]: Re: So guys is this spam? Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jul 24, 2010 3:24 pm Smugleaf wrote: Does anybody of you know the name of the fonts used in the EoE titles?, i mean "one more final etc..." because i like those =(, please EGF help your lovely smugleaf to get those

[]: Re: So guys is this spam? Post by Smugleaf » Sat Jul 24, 2010 3:30 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Here's a bit of advice, title your threads appropriately so people actually know what the fuck you're talking about.

[]: Post by Ornette » Sat Jul 24, 2010 3:31 pm Or look for the thread that has your answer: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=392
